goal: Register a UR10e arm as a ros2_control hardware interface mock using the velocity_controllers path. Step 1: precheck_ros2_environment to confirm rclpy available. Step 2: robot_wizard to load UR10e at /World/UR10e. Step 3: setup_ros2_control_compat with controller_type='velocity_controllers' to wire /isaac_joint_states + /isaac_joint_commands for velocity-control clients. Step 4: emit_ros2_control_yaml with controller_type='velocity_controllers' + update_rate_hz=500 to write the hardware-interface YAML. Step 5: setup_ros2_bridge profile=ur10e_moveit2 to build the OmniGraph with velocity-command subscriber. Step 6: configure_ros2_time mode='sim_time'. Step 7: ros2_list_topics to verify /isaac_joint_states and /isaac_joint_commands present. Step 8: diagnose_ros2 to confirm QoS + domain health. Distinct from CP-NEW-ros2-moveit2-franka: exercises velocity_controllers branch (not joint_trajectory_controller) + UR10e (not Franka) + omits cumotion plugin (hardware-interface mock path only, no motion planner).
thoughts:
Distinctness argument:

1) CP-NEW-ros2-moveit2-franka covers joint_trajectory_controller + Franka + cumotion plugin (M1+M4). This template covers velocity_controllers + UR10e + no planner (hardware-interface mock only). The controller_type branch in setup_ros2_control_compat and emit_ros2_control_yaml changes the generated YAML (controller class + interface types); both code paths need separate canonical coverage.

2) Hardware-interface mock use-case: external velocity-control clients (e.g. impedance controllers, force-control nodes) connect to /isaac_joint_commands expecting velocity setpoints, not trajectory segments. The mock YAML declares velocity command interface for all 6 joints instead of position+velocity.

3) Tool-chain order: precheck_ros2_environment → robot_wizard → setup_ros2_control_compat (needs live articulation for joint-name discovery) → emit_ros2_control_yaml (reads compat config) → setup_ros2_bridge (builds OmniGraph) → configure_ros2_time (must precede first sim step) → verify.

4) UR10e at [0, 0, 0.8] on table (0.4 m half-height). CPU dynamics (MBP, no GPU) for stable joint-state output.

5) update_rate_hz=500 (vs 1000 in moveit2 template) — typical for velocity-control loops; covers the parameter variant.

6) Verification: ros2_list_topics (topic existence) + diagnose_ros2 (QoS + DDS domain). No sim_control play required — bridge is middleware.
code:
# ── Preflight ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
precheck_ros2_environment(rosbridge_port=9090)

# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.2], scale=[0.8, 0.6, 0.4])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU determinism ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Robot ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="ur10e",
    dest_path="/World/UR10e",
    position=[0, 0, 0.8],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── M1: velocity_controllers compat ──────────────────────────────────────────
# Wires /isaac_joint_states + /isaac_joint_commands for velocity-control clients.
setup_ros2_control_compat(
    robot_path="/World/UR10e",
    joint_states_topic="/isaac_joint_states",
    joint_commands_topic="/isaac_joint_commands",
    controller_type="velocity_controllers",
)

# ── M1: emit hardware-interface YAML ─────────────────────────────────────────
# velocity_controllers branch: declares velocity command interface for all joints.
emit_ros2_control_yaml(
    robot_path="/World/UR10e",
    controller_type="velocity_controllers",
    output_path="/tmp/ur10e_ros2_control_velocity.yaml",
    joint_states_topic="/isaac_joint_states",
    joint_commands_topic="/isaac_joint_commands",
    update_rate_hz=500,
)

# ── ROS2 clock — must precede OmniGraph build ─────────────────────────────────
configure_ros2_time(mode="sim_time")

# ── OmniGraph bridge ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
setup_ros2_bridge(
    profile="ur10e_moveit2",
    robot_path="/World/UR10e",
    graph_path="/World/ROS2_Velocity_Bridge",
)

# ── Verification ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ros2_list_topics()
diagnose_ros2()
failure_modes: robot_wizard called with robot_name='ur10e' but UR10e USD not in Isaac Sim asset cache — returns asset_not_found; fall back to asset_path pointing to local URDF.
setup_ros2_control_compat called before robot_wizard — no articulation at /World/UR10e; joint-name discovery returns empty list; always call robot_wizard first.

velocity_controllers YAML declares only velocity command interface — downstream joint_trajectory_controller nodes will reject it; use controller_type='joint_trajectory_controller' for MoveIt2 trajectory execution.
configure_ros2_time called after setup_ros2_bridge — /clock messages emit timestamp=0 for first N sim steps; always call configure_ros2_time before setup_ros2_bridge.
ur10e_moveit2 profile not found in older Isaac Sim versions — setup_ros2_bridge raises KeyError; use configure_ros2_bridge manually instead.
QoS mismatch on /isaac_joint_commands — velocity-control client uses BEST_EFFORT, bridge publishes RELIABLE; diagnose_ros2 reports qos_mismatch; add QoS override in client node params.
code_template:
precheck_ros2_environment(rosbridge_port=9090)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.2], scale=[0.8, 0.6, 0.4])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)
setup_ros2_control_compat(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    joint_states_topic="/isaac_joint_states",
    joint_commands_topic="/isaac_joint_commands",
    controller_type="velocity_controllers",
)
emit_ros2_control_yaml(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    controller_type="velocity_controllers",
    output_path="/tmp/ur10e_ros2_control_velocity.yaml",
    joint_states_topic="/isaac_joint_states",
    joint_commands_topic="/isaac_joint_commands",
    update_rate_hz=500,
)
configure_ros2_time(mode="sim_time")
setup_ros2_bridge(profile="ur10e_moveit2", robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, graph_path="/World/ROS2_Velocity_Bridge")
ros2_list_topics()
diagnose_ros2()
